```{ojs}
//| echo: false
{
  const x1Min = -10, x1Max = 10;
  const x2Min = -10, x2Max = 10;
  const step = 0.25;

  const x1s = d3.range(x1Min, x1Max + step, step);
  const x2s = d3.range(x2Min, x2Max + step, step);
  
  const m = -w1 / w2;
  const ord = -b_2d / w2;
  
  const boundaryData = x1s.map(xi => ({ x1: xi, x2: m * xi + ord }));

  const gridData = x1s.flatMap(x1 =>
    x2s.map(x2 => ({
      x1,
      x2,
      pred: activation(w1 * x1 + w2 * x2 + b_2d) >= 0.5 ? 1 : 0
    }))
  );

  const plot = Plot.plot({
    width: 640,
    height: 420,
    x: {label: "x1", domain: [x1Min, x1Max]},
    y: {label: "x2", domain: [x2Min, x2Max]},
    color: {
      domain: [0, 1],
      range: ["#9ecae1", "#bae4b3"],
      legend: true,
      legendOrientation: "right",
      label: "σ(wx + b)"
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.raster({
        x1: x1Min,
        x2: x1Max,
        y1: x2Min,
        y2: x2Max,
        pixelSize: 4,
        fill: (x1, x2) => activation(w1 * x1 + w2 * x2 + b_2d)
      }),      
      Plot.ruleX([0], { stroke: "black", strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
      Plot.ruleY([0], { stroke: "black", strokeDasharray: "4,4" }),
      Plot.line(boundaryData, {
        x: "x1",
        y: "x2",
        stroke: "black",
        strokeWidth: 3
      })
    ]
  });

  const title = document.createElement("div");
  title.textContent = `Decision boundary`;
  title.style.cssText = "text-align: center; font-size: 0.9em; margin-bottom: 2px;";

  const div = document.createElement("div");
  div.style.cssText = "display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;";
  div.appendChild(title);
  div.appendChild(plot);
  return div;
}
```
